title: carduncellus hispanicus subsp. intercedens
intro: Carduncellus hispanicus subsp. intercedens, also known as the Spanish artichoke, is a perennial plant belonging to the thistle family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of silymarin and flavonoids. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to protect the liver, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Carduncellus hispanicus subsp. intercedens can be prepared as an herbal supplement, tea, or infusion, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
